title: morus mesozygia var. lactea
intro: Morus mesozygia var. lactea, also known as the African white mulberry, is a deciduous tree species native to tropical Africa. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Morus mesozygia var. lactea include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
